hooks.description: Check for hardcoded secrets before writing
Run security audit on bash commands
Validates version bump, CHANGELOG, and build before git push
Enforce PR format and CHANGELOG entry before gh pr create

hooks.prompt:
STOP. Before running gh pr merge, follow squash merge conventions:
1. TITLE: Let GitHub default it — "PR title (#N)" format.
2. BODY: Write a clean, concise summary of the branch's work (2-4 sentences).
   NEVER use the automatic squash description that dumps all individual commit messages.

3. Use --body flag with a HEREDOC to pass the clean description.
Example: gh pr merge N --squash --body "$(cat <<'EOF' Add loaf housekeeping CLI command that scans .agents/ directories and recommends cleanup actions. Includes shared prompt helpers, scanner engine, interactive/dry-run modes, and skill update. EOF )"
Rewrite your gh pr merge command now with a clean --body.

ADVISORY: You are about to run `git push`. 
Confirm the following before proceeding: - All tests pass locally - CHANGELOG.md has been updated - Version has been bumped if releasing
Type 'yes' to proceed with the push.

hooks.description: Detect Linear magic words for auto-status updates
Regenerate TASKS.md when task files change
Track covered edits and nudge when covered knowledge is stale

hooks.prompt:
POST-MERGE HOUSEKEEPING:
1. Delete local branch: git branch -d <branch-name> 2. Update main: git checkout main && git pull 3. Archive session: loaf session archive
Consider running these commands now.
hooks.description: Inject housekeeping checklist after successful gh pr merge
Auto-log commit entry to session journal
Auto-log PR creation entry to session journal
Auto-log merge entry to session journal
Start session journal and surface session context
End session with progress summary and KB follow-up
Append compact entry to session journal before context compaction
Require journal flush before context compaction
hooks.prompt:
CONTEXT COMPACTION IMMINENT: Your conversation context will be compacted soon.
REQUIRED: Flush all unrecorded journal entries NOW, before responding to the user. Do not defer — entries lost to compaction cannot be recovered.
Entry types: - `decide(scope): key decisions made this session` - `discover(scope): important findings` - `conclude(scope): session summary`
Run `loaf session log "type(scope): description"` for each entry, then continue.

hooks.description: Require journal entries when edits/commits exist without decision entries
hooks.prompt:
SESSION JOURNAL NUDGE: You have made edits or commits this turn but have not recorded any `decide()`, `discover()`, or `conclude()` entries in the session journal.
REQUIRED: Log journal entries NOW, before responding to the user. Do not defer, acknowledge, or treat this as advisory — run the commands first, then respond.
Entry types: - `decide(scope): rationale for decision made` - `discover(scope): insight or finding` - `conclude(scope): final summary or learning`
Run `loaf session log "type(scope): description"` for each unrecorded decision or finding. Then continue with your response to the user.
